title: microlicia jungermannioides
intro: Microlicia jungermannioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the "Brazilian magic flower." It is a plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Amazon rainforest, where it is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections, due to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Microlicia jungermannioides is traditionally prepared as a tea or infused in water to create a herbal remedy, and it has also been used in traditional folk medicine to create topical ointments and creams.
